narrative_text: A curious orange sea turtle named Tilly has just discovered a glowing, ancient treasure chest half-buried in the shimmering blue sands. She reaches out a flipper to see what's inside while a school of tiny silver fish watches from behind a large piece of pink coral.
branch_summary: Help Tilly the Sea Turtle uncover the secrets of a glowing underwater treasure chest!
scene_description: A vibrant underwater seascape at midday with sunbeams piercing through the turquoise water, creating dancing light patterns on the sandy floor. The color palette is dominated by deep teals, bright pinks, and shimmering golds. The composition follows a rule-of-thirds layout with the main character on the left and the treasure on the right, creating a sense of discovery and mystery.

properties.color: warm amber shell with sun-bleached yellow hexagonal patterns and teal-spotted flippers
properties.size: medium, about the size of a large dinner plate
properties.texture: smooth, hard leathery shell and soft wrinkled skin
properties.pattern: hexagonal shell plates and speckled limbs
properties.distinctive_features: a small, friendly smile and a tiny chip on the back edge of its shell

entities.pose: swimming horizontally, right front flipper extended forward as if to touch something, head tilted down toward the ground

properties.color: dark weathered wood with tarnished gold bands and a soft cyan inner glow
properties.texture: grainy wood and cold, pitted metal
properties.pattern: horizontal wooden planks reinforced by vertical metal straps
properties.distinctive_features: the lid is slightly ajar, emitting a magical pulsating light from within

entities.pose: sitting at a slight tilt, half-submerged in the sand with the lid cracked open

properties.color: vibrant flamingo pink with deep magenta crevices
properties.distinctive_features: three small glowing sea-anemones growing from its side

properties.color: shimmering metallic silver with neon blue stripes
properties.distinctive_features: a cluster of seven fish moving as one unit

entities.pose: swimming in a tight synchronized curve, all facing toward the turtle

error_exclusions.reason: There is only one main character turtle.
The chest is a static object.
